# Copilot Instructions for Attendance Manipulation System

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements: Full-stack attendance system with Node.js/Express backend, MongoDB, HTML/CSS/JS frontend, authentication, admin/student roles, CRUD for attendance, responsive design.
- [x] Scaffold the Project: Created backend, frontend, and .github directories.
- [ ] Customize the Project: Implement backend and frontend code.
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete: README.md and this file are up to date.

Work through each checklist item systematically. Keep communication concise and focused. Follow development best practices.
